On This Page 
AUR Promoting Interoperability Program Guidance AUR Synthetic Data Set Validation AUR Promoting Interoperability Program Validation Tool ONC Certification 
The NHSN Antimicrobial Use (AU) and Antimicrobial Resistance (AR) (AUR) Module reporting was identified as one option to meet the Public Health Registry reporting element within the Centers for Medicare and Medicaid Services (CMS) Medicare Promoting Interoperability (PI) Program for eligible hospitals and critical access hospitals (CAHs) in 2017. This option continues to be available in calendar year (CY) 2023, and facilities reporting to the NHSN AUR Module will receive 5 b
